file_name: Vets Central - Hills Veterinary Centre - Questionnaire.pdf

questions.text: Provide a brief description of the reasons for your interest in this matter (for example, whether you are a customer, veterinarian, veterinary nurse, veterinary technician, supplier or insurer).
Are Familypet Vet Coromandel Valley and Hills Veterinary Centre close competitors in the supply of veterinary services? Please explain your response.
Please list any other veterinary clinics that compete closely with Hills Veterinary Centre. Please explain your response.

Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition, including if you have any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition.
